identity_notes: the grey-brown squirrel returned with different posture — carrying something, not confrontational
the read started and didn't complete; attention too low to commit to exchange
the offer closed without trade; the east boundary sits differently for it
west spot produced again; the line held; no inventory gained
heat cut the west run yield; came back thinner than the trip justified
the offer not taken has a shape now — visible from the shade line looking east
